response.step_by_step_log: Identified the video performer as Airani Iofifteen from Hololive. Recognized the Japanese text '心の坂道' on screen, which is the song title. Searched for '心の坂道 HANDSIGN' to confirm the original artist. Extracted English lyrics from the provided video subtitles and sourced the original Japanese lyrics from public lyric databases. Constructed a single scene for the duration of the musical performance.
response.global_summary: A video of VTuber Airani Iofifteen performing a Japanese song 'Kokoro no Sakamichi' by HANDSIGN. The video features the performer dancing in a virtual, cosmic-themed environment.

scenes.description: VTuber Airani Iofifteen performs 'Kokoro no Sakamichi' in a virtual, celestial-themed studio with subtitles and visual effects. Other characters (Moona Hoshinova, Sakura Miko) appear in a frame in the background during parts of the performance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
何度も苦しい思いをした
何度も悲しい思いもした
今日までたくさん歩いてきた
心の坂道は
君がいたから強くなれた
傷だらけである坂も歩けた
君がいるから歩いていけるさ
涙の跡を残さないで
あの日君は言っていた
本当の強さは
泣いてもまた笑えることだよ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It hit me like a stab in the back
In torn-up jeans and a heart with a crack
The cold wind gently passes through
The moment I took a single step ahead
I found you standing there instead
I've been through pain more times than I can say
I've felt the sorrow that wouldn't go away
Step by step, I've made it here today
Up the hill where my feelings lay
Because you were there for me
I found the strength to be
Even with scars, I climbed that hill with ease
Because you're here with me
I know I'll keep walking free
Leaving no tears for the world to see
That day, you said to me
True strength is being able to cry, then smile again, you know?

scenes.description: The song ends, the background fades to black, and a logo 'Lucid Dream' with illustrations of the characters appears.
